title: Set up Kysely type-safe SQL query builder
summary: Install Kysely, define the database type schema, create a shared database client, and write type-safe queries with joins, inserts, and migrations.
declaration: I will set up Kysely as the SQL query builder. Kysely provides full TypeScript type safety for raw SQL queries without a heavy ORM layer. It works with PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite. I will configure it for PostgreSQL by default — tell me if you need a different dialect.
